title: Secure pilot office/steward + independent guardrail audit + expert sign-off of shipped content
context: The project is not shipped until a real office adopts it and uses it to fulfill a duty or improve a constituent outcome. This task secures the pilot office/official or sponsoring civic org, assigns a steward, arranges an independent guardrail audit, and confirms all shipped content has credentialed expert sign-off. Gated on the dated partner-acquisition plan: jurisdiction by 2026-08-31, expert by 2026-10-31, pilot office/steward by 2026-12-31. If no pilot is secured by 2027-03-31, the build-vs-mothball/pivot decision rule applies.
objective: Secure a real pilot office/official or sponsoring civic organization (flipping verifiedNeed to true), assign a steward, arrange an independent government-ethics guardrail audit, and confirm all shipped duty/compliance content has recorded expert sign-off -- completing the M5 adoption gate.
acceptanceCriteria: A real official/office or sponsoring civic org is secured as the pilot; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true on all delivery-dependent tasks
Independent government-ethics reviewer audits guardrail refusal behavior; audit report recorded
All shipped duty/compliance content has recorded credentialed expert sign-off (version-scoped)
Privacy controls confirmed in force by the steward
Partner-acquisition milestones met: jurisdiction selected by 2026-08-31, credentialed expert by 2026-10-31, pilot office/steward by 2026-12-31
If no pilot is secured by 2027-03-31, the build-vs-mothball/pivot decision rule is applied and recorded in governance
output: A document recording the secured pilot office/steward, the independent guardrail audit report, the content expert sign-off ledger, and the confirmed privacy-controls status -- the M5 adoption gate that enables public-official-guide-handoff-021.
